source_script_line: Team gives Static space instead of ordering silence.
staging_intent: Static alone mid-ground on the sidewalk, small in frame; Moodz and Scarline in the near foreground flanking the composition, both turned inward watching him with concern from a respectful distance. The physical gap IS the story beat.

characters.asset_note: Worried variant: hunched, self-contained -- reads as overwhelmed-but-managing from a distance. Swap to the bespoke freeze pose asset if/when it passes identity QA (Cycle 13).
characters.body_orientation: three-quarter, slightly turned away from the group

ground_contact.surface: wet sidewalk pavers near the storefront

characters.asset_note: Faces slightly viewer-left in the source render -- placed screen-right of Static so her gaze naturally lands on him. Red stripe stays on canon viewer-left (no mirroring).
characters.action: watching Static, hands clasped, giving him room

ground_contact.surface: wet street edge by the right curb

characters.asset_note: Faces slightly viewer-right in the source render -- placed screen-left of Static so his gaze crosses toward him. Beanie/eye-patches symmetric, but no mirroring needed anyway.
characters.action: watching Static, holding back from crowding him

ground_contact.surface: shallow water sheet on the near-left sidewalk (inside the declared reflective surface)

reflection.note: He stands IN the water sheet, so a reflection is the physically correct grounding cue here (first run had shadow only, which read as floating on water -- caught on inspection).

decompression_note: Was MZ-2026-09-02_P06_PANEL02 in the 24-panel edition; same locked beat, renumbered by the 16-page/96-panel format directive.
